subcodes.first_line: Convey to the divines these words of Bahá: Ye have deemed Us to be deserving of blame. Why did ye turn away from the Seal of the Prophets?
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعلماء از قول بها بگو ما بزعم شما مقصریم از خاتم انبیا چرا اعراض نمودید از
